title: Asuka and Kaworu how will they interact
display_title: Asuka and Kaworu how will they interact
wikitext:
[]: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Fri Apr 20, 2012 12:48 pm I figured that if there's a thread discussing how Asuka and Mari will interact in 3.0 and 4.0, how about Kaworu and Asuka? My own thoughts are partially derived from a deleted storyboard for Eva 2.0 which I've seen (I can't seem to find a link unfortunately). In this scene, which is meant to take place during the battle with Bardiel, Kaworu says something like Asuka being happy doesn't suit her, and that she should revert to being miserable. What is everyone else's thoughts on the matter? P.S. If this is a duplicate thread, could this be merged with any pre-existing threads dealing with Kaworu and Asuka?

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 20, 2012 1:05 pm driftking18594 wrote: I figured that if there's a thread discussing how Asuka and Mari will interact in 3.0 and 4.0, how about Kaworu and Asuka? My own thoughts are partially derived from a deleted storyboard for Eva 2.0 which I've seen (I can't seem to find a link unfortunately). In this scene, which is meant to take place during the battle with Bardiel, Kaworu says something like Asuka being happy doesn't suit her, and that she should revert to being miserable. What is everyone else's thoughts on the matter? P.S. If this is a duplicate thread, could this be merged with any pre-existing threads dealing with Kaworu and Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Fri Apr 20, 2012 1:09 pm Or, "HAVE FUN WHEN THAT BITCH MAKES YOU HIS CRUTCH!" But, I share Bagheera's sentiments with the Angel killing and all.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 20, 2012 1:39 pm Bagheera wrote: MY Shinji,

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Apr 20, 2012 2:48 pm Mr. Tines wrote: AFAIK that that would not be in character for Shikinami.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Na7e » Fri Apr 20, 2012 3:42 pm Bagheera wrote: She only gave up because she thought she'd lost. Once she learns it was all a sibling thing she'll be back with a vengeance.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Brainman » Fri Apr 20, 2012 4:00 pm Na7e wrote: Assuming she isn't a complete fucking wreck after being Bardieled. She ran away to Eva because she sucked at socializing. Her little coping device got seriously messed up, and she has made no meaningful connections.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Fri Apr 20, 2012 5:41 pm I don't think he'd be particularly polite to the Second. In EOE, his braindead clones took pleasure in goddamn eviscerating her. Come to think of it, I can't really imagine that Kaworu will be pleasant toward anyone who isn't Shinji. He's dead set on making sure that the Third (and only the Third) will end up happy. As for Asuka? I don't think she'll be too fond of him either, probably due to his otherworldy nature.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Na7e » Fri Apr 20, 2012 8:46 pm Brainman wrote: Would you not say then that Asuka is in a similar situation of intense isolation and hopelessness as Shinji was in episode 24?

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 21, 2012 1:40 am Na7e wrote: But, compared to everyone else in NME, her life is the definition of shit upon waking. She decided to be alone, even acknowledging that she is socially retarded, and can't really fit in with people. But, on top of that Eva which she used as a coping device blew up in her face, coupled with the possible mind-rape. She's not going to be in a very good place, can't turn towards people nor her Eva.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Na7e » Sat Apr 21, 2012 1:49 am Bagheera wrote: Hey now. Need I remind you that one of the previews show her, in her Eva, in space, blowing shit up? It seems pretty clear she'll be able to turn toward her Eva just fine.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 21, 2012 4:11 am Na7e wrote: Of course, I just mentioned she's going to have to work on all her issues. I can guarantee that's going to be the final fight in Q. You can't have her just sweep pretty much what accounts to a rape for her under the carpet.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 21, 2012 9:10 am Bagheera wrote: Say what? No they aren't.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Apr 21, 2012 9:26 am You say this as if Anno and friends aren't still making it up as they go even now.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 21, 2012 9:44 am NemZ wrote: You say this as if Anno and friends aren't still making it up as they go even now.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 21, 2012 10:26 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yes, they are. The 4 shadows with Kaworu are Reis of different ages--but that note is in the storyboards, not the script. Pretty sure they're the same group of Reis that are also with Mari, but Reichu would know for sure.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Na7e » Sat Apr 21, 2012 10:53 am Bagheera wrote: If it didn't make it to the final script you can't assume it's still valid. That said, though, I gotta admit it would make sense of the shadows we see there -- I never could make sense of the one being a full head taller than the others.

[]: Re: Asuka and Kaworu - how will they interact?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Apr 21, 2012 11:01 am Na7e wrote: Apparently in the Storyboard the Rei clones are aged 6-10.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu06 » Sun Apr 22, 2012 1:08 am They might be a couple...think, best why to break a man is though the heart! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sun Apr 22, 2012 11:02 am I see Kaworu and the Mark 06 replacing the Mass Produced Evas when everything inevitably goes to shit, and assuming Kaworu's relation to Shinji is the same as in NGE he'll have to choose between Kaworu and Asuka or something. Maybe Kaworu will replace Rei so it'll be a more direct fantasy Vs reality thing. In fact, I think it's highly likely that if there's a Seele Vs NERV fight in Rebuild Kaworu will DEFINITELY be fighting Asuka, since the MP Evas are his dummy plugs and Anno seems to like referencing EoE in Rebuild.
